## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Netwrix and GrowthX Labs for content strategy and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Netwrix faces challenges with multiple acquisitions, international teams, and a broad product portfolio across various market segments.](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation and optimization services, combining advanced workflows with human expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Netwrix has a large content surface area (14,000 pages) with significant potential for optimization and traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs can provide comprehensive support for content strategy, creation, and website migration, including technical SEO guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

## Topics

### Netwrix Company Overview

  - [Identity and data security focus with 18 products](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Grown through acquisitions (8 companies in 3 years)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [International presence with teams in Eastern Europe](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Mix of high-volume mid-market and enterprise customers (1/3 of Fortune 500)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Profitable "ankle biter" competing with category leaders](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [PE-owned company](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### GrowthX Labs Services and Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [90-day pilot period with deep strategy development in the first week](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Team includes managing director, managing editor, SEO specialists, and production assistants](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Services: editorial content, programmatic SEO, long-form content, and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Pricing at approximately 10 cents per word for high-quality, scalable content](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Workflow-based approach for research, planning, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Analysis of competitors and existing content for optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Focus on search intent and user personas for content relevance](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Consideration of both traditional search and AI-generated answers (20-30% of traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Ability to refresh and optimize existing content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Technical Capabilities

  - [Custom-built infrastructure for AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Processing millions of tokens and running thousands of processes](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Ability to analyze and prioritize content based on search volume and potential traffic gains](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### Netwrix Content Challenges

  - [Large volume of outdated content (14,000 pages overall)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Multiple websites, including main site, blog, and acquired company sites](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Upcoming brand refresh and migration to headless CMS](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [GrowthX Labs can assist with content refresh and creation during website migration](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Potential to start with double the standard workstream (100,000 words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Support for technical SEO and migration challenges at no additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Ability to work on multiple sites simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send a follow-up email with a proposal based on the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Consider starting collaboration soon, given GrowthX Labs' booking through April 21st](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Evaluate timing of engagement in relation to Netwrix's planned website migration and brand refresh](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Explore potential for content optimization on acquired company websites (e.g., endpoint protector.com)](https://fathom.video/share/E2M9NFxX2K8VbAZxsjygo7icRf7WcFGy?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
